race.comment: MORTHAN EFFICIENT (4) settled well back then made some inroads and finished 5 lengths away in fifth last time over 1800m in Adelaide. This a touch easier and will appreciate the extra distance, so everything looks good bar the barrier. SUPER MIRAGE (6) ran a bold race over this journey last start, racing on the pace and sticking on strongly to finish half a length away in second at Pakenham. Ideally placed and is sure to prove tough to beat. Ignore the fact ADMIRE FLUKE (8) has never finished further back than fourth in four starts, that fourth being last start in the Tassie Derby, which is form that should translate to here. LUCKETT (3) finished immediately behind SUPER MIRAGE last start, so if the latter is a chance you've got to concede LUCKETT a hope.
